findings.rationale: duplicate of security finding at the same call site
findings.explanation: Same call site as the security finding — race-condition risk if GenericWorkload feature flag flips during scheduler runtime since newOpportunisticBatch caches the value once.

findings.rationale: nested condition in batchStateCompatible adds branching that is hard to follow
findings.explanation: The new condition `if !b.genericWorkloadEnabled || cycleCount != b.lastCycle.cycleCount` collapses two distinct error paths into one expression. A cycleCount mismatch with GenericWorkload disabled and a cycleCount mismatch with GenericWorkload enabled now share the same return path, making future regressions harder to diagnose.
